## PiWsArtifactConfig interface

Generated artifact transfer settings for the built-in Pi WebSocket route.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PiWsArtifactConfig
```

## Remarks

When enabled, `pi-ws` creates a per-connection artifact directory, tells Pi to write generated files there, and forwards stable files to the websocket client as metadata text frames plus binary frames.
